summary: The diff partially addresses the three requirements. REQ-3 (simplified $1 payment for ticket creation) is well-implemented in TicketCreationForm.tsx and backend/main.mo. REQ-1 (remove History tab from CustomerDashboard/ClientPortal) appears partially addressed in ClientPortal.tsx (only 2 tabs visible: tickets and plans), but CustomerDashboard.tsx was not modified in the diff. REQ-2 (disable auto-scroll) has no evidence of implementation in any modified file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove ServiceHistoryTimeline and any related History tab from CustomerDashboard entirely.
missing_requirements.reason: CustomerDashboard.tsx does not appear in the modified files list. There is no direct diff evidence of ServiceHistoryTimeline being removed from CustomerDashboard. Only ClientPortal.tsx was modified and shows 2 tabs with no History tab.

missing_requirements.requirement: Disable automatic scroll-to-top behavior on tab changes in both CustomerDashboard and ExpertDashboard.
missing_requirements.reason: None of the modified files contain any changes related to removing window.scrollTo, element.scrollTop, or scroll behavior. Neither CustomerDashboard.tsx nor ExpertDashboard.tsx appear in the modified files list.

hallucinated_features.description: Support Plans tab in ClientPortal with INR pricing tiers (Basic at Rs.299, Premium plan)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a Plans tab or INR-denominated support plans to the ClientPortal. The diff shows a new plans tab with rupee-denominated pricing which was not requested.
